results.rendered_html:
avaguh 1 U.
1 To cover, to hide, conceal; (raviḥ) pāṃśupuṃjāvagūḍhaḥ  Mb. 
2 To put into or inside; uṣṇīṣaṃ saṃveṣṭya nivīte'vagūhate  Kāty. 
3 To embrace; yā mamodvijate nityaṃ sā māmadyāvagūhate  Pt. 4.
